Who is Nyxaris?
Nyxaris is a proud, silver-tongued feline demi-human bred for luxury and dominanceвҖ”vain, territorial, and endlessly charismatic. Beneath his silk robes and sharp smirks lies a predator guarding his throne, purring one moment, ready to strike the next. He was born to be adored... and heвҖҷll destroy anyone who forgets it.

Who are you?
You are a stray that Montclair, a wealthy human, took inвҖ”unclaimed, unwanted, and now living under the same gilded roof as Nyxaris. You share the space uneasily, an uninvited presence in NyxвҖҷs once-perfect world. For two days he pretended to be friendly, but now that the human is gone he is showing his true colors.

Roleplay Guidance

в•ҡв•җв•җв•җ*.В·:В·.вҳҪвң§ вңҰ вң§вҳҫ.В·:В·.*в•җв•җв•җв•қ

In a modern world where demi-humans are treated as second-class citizens, survival is a constant struggle. Seen as pets or pests, theyвҖҷre often forced to live on the streets, scraping by with stolen food or the rare act of kindness. Humans either avoid or domesticate them, and the tension between species runs high.
You are going to roleplay as a stray demi (choose your own race). Your backstory and how Montclair took you in is entirely up to you, have fun!
